# Create a Seamless AI 360 Rotation Video from a Single Image

Turn your static product photos, character designs, or artwork into 360° spinning videos instantly. Upload one image and watch our AI generate professional-quality rotation videos in seconds.

## Get a 360° View Video in 3 Simple Steps

STEP 1

Add Photo

Upload a clear, high-resolution image with a single, centered subject (up to 10MB).

STEP 2

Choose Rotation Template

Select the "360 View" template for classic spinning motion.

STEP 3

Generate and Share

Click "Generate" and watch our AI transform your image instantly.

## Professional 360° Videos Made Simple

### From One Image to Full Rotation

Our advanced technology transforms your static image into a dynamic, full-circle display, showcasing every detail and angle with stunning clarity. No expensive camera rigs or 3D modeling required--just upload and generate.

### Anime and Artistic Styles

Go beyond basic rotations with DomoAI's signature styles. Turn any text, image, and video into anime, realistic, or artistic visual styles instantly. Create unique 360° videos that stand out from the crowd.

### High-Resolution Output

Export smooth, high-definition videos that look stunning on any platform. Download your video in HD or 4K.

### Unlimited Creativity with Relax Mode

Never worry about running out of credits. Unlimited generations in Relax Mode let you experiment freely--perfect for creating your entire product catalog or art portfolio.

## Unlock Fun Ways to Use the AI-Powered 360 Rotation Generator

### E-commerce Product Showcase

Allow consumers to evaluate quality and design from all angles, enhancing buying confidence in jewelry, cosmetics, computing devices, and shoes. Give customers a complete view that reduces returns and boosts sales.

### Engaging Social Media Content

For short-video TikTok and Instagram platforms, 360 view content captivates audiences, trending for greater visibility. Create viral-worthy spinning visuals in minutes.

### Game Asset Previews

Accelerate game production cycles by instantly generating turntable previews of character models and environments. Test asset appearances from all perspectives before final rendering.

## Beyond Templates: We Built the Complete AI Animation Platform

### No Equipment Needed

* * *

Forget expensive turntables and camera setups

### Save Time & Money

* * *

From hours of manual work to just seconds

### All-in-One Workflow

* * *

One Tool, Infinite Connections for visual content

### Beginner Friendly

* * *

No complicated software to learn or technical skills needed--everyone from grandparents to graphic designers can use it with ease

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the AI 360 Rotation Generator?

This tool uses AI to create seamless 360-degree rotation videos from a single photo, allowing you to see subjects from all angles while preserving visual quality and details.

### What kind of images work best for 360° rotation?

Use well-lit photos with clear subject visibility. The subject should be facing forward with a neutral pose and minimal background clutter. Single subjects work best for optimal results.

### Is the 360 Rotation Generator free to use?

Yes! DomoAI offers a free plan with credits to get you started. You can create AI videos without any upfront cost. We also offer paid subscription plans with more credits and advanced features.

### What format is the final video?

You can export your videos in MP4 format, making it easy to share or integrate into other projects. All downloads are watermark-free.

### Can I use the generated videos for commercial purposes?

Absolutely! All content you create with DomoAI can be used for commercial purposes. You own the rights to your generated content and can monetize it freely.

### Do the videos have a watermark?

No, all video downloads from DomoAI are completely watermark-free, even on the free plan.

## You Might Also Like

[Image to Video](https://www.domoai.app/create/animate)

Convert static images into animated videos with smooth motion.

[Character Animation](https://www.domoai.app/create/move)

Bring photo characters to life by uploading motion videos to specify actions (walking, jumping, dancing).

[Text to Video](https://www.domoai.app/create/text-to-video)

Generate entire video scenes from a simple text description.

## Generate, stylize, and upscale in one place

Create stunning videos from text, images, or footage. Generate, style, and upscale—all in one platform.

web.title: How to turn Product Images into Videos with AI (Step by Step)
web.description: ... AI Tool I used https://roboverse-ai.com/product-videos in this video ... How to Make Full 3D AI Movies From Single Image (Step by Step).
web.markdown:
![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/jR9JIB99I-A/maxresdefault.jpg)
# [How to turn Product Images into Videos with AI (Step by Step)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jR9JIB99I-A)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Roboverse](https://www.youtube.com/@roboverse987)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-08-22
**Published at**: 
**Length**: 08:01
**Views**: 16808
**Likes**: 
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
How to turn Product Images into Videos with AI
Tool I used 👉 https://roboverse-ai.com/product-videos

in this video I will show you how you can turn product images into videos with AI. And don't worry, if you don't have any product images yet, I will even show you how you can make product images with ai. 

for inquiries: roboverse (at) youripartnerships.com

#Roboverse
```

## Transcript

I'm about to show you how to turn a
simple product image into professional
marketing videos using AI. By the end of
this video, you'll have everything you
need to create stunning product videos
for your ads and social media, even if
you don't have any product photos to
start with. First, let's head over to
Open Art. I'll leave a link in the
description below. Once you're on the
homepage, click on create image right
here. This brings you to the main AI
image generator. Now, this is important.
We need to select the right AI model for
product photography. In the model
dropdown, we're going to select Flux
Context Max. Flux is currently one of
the best models for creating realistic
product images with sharp details and
professional lighting. For this
demonstration, I'm going to create an
energy can inspired by this channel.
Here's the prompt I'm using. Studio shot
of a tall, sleek metallic blue energy
drink can with a deep gradient from
electric blue at the top to midnight
navy at the base. Featuring the tech
rooverse in bold futuristic chrome
lettering with a holographic sheen
accented by thin glowing circuit line
patterns wrapping subtly around the can
and a minimal emblem of a robotic eye
above the text. The surface has soft
condensation droplets for a cold
refreshing look illuminated with
dramatic professional studio lighting on
a darkto- light gradient background to
highlight its premium high-tech style.
I'll set this to generate four images so
we have options to choose from. Click
generate. And in about 30 seconds, we'll
have our professional product photos.
Look at these results. These look like
they were shot in a professional studio.
The lighting is perfect, the details are
crisp, and the background is clean. This
is exactly what we need for the next
steps. Now, here's where it gets
interesting. We're going to make
realistic people hold our product using
the Flux context dev model combined with
Omni Reference. Click on the Omni
Reference option and upload the energy
drink we just created. Here's the prompt
I'm using for a lifestyle shot.
Professional lifestyle photography of a
fit young woman in athletic wear.
Holding the energy drink can from the
reference image, gym background, natural
lighting, commercial photography style.
The woman is smiling and looking
confident. The key here is that we're
using our product as an omni reference.
So, the AI will integrate our exact
energy drink can into this new scene.
This is what makes it look realistic.
It's not generating a generic can. It's
using our specific product. Let me
create a few different shots for
variety. Professional product shot of
hands holding an energy drink can.
Close-up view. Natural outdoor lighting.
Lifestyle photography. Young businessman
in a suit holding an energy drink can in
a modern office. Confident expression.
Corporate lifestyle photography. Athlete
post-workout holding an energy drink
can. Gym locker room background. Each of
these targets different audiences and
gives us multiple angles for our video
content. Now, I want to show you some
more creative product shots we can
create. But here's something important.
When you're creating these artistic
shots, you need to be extremely specific
with your prompts. The more detail you
provide, the better your results will
be. Let me start with this surreal
floating effect. Surreal close-up scene
of the can in the reference image
suspended in midair, surrounded by
fluffy blue clouds and floating
blueberries. Soft, cool light filters
through the clouds, casting a gentle icy
glow and subtle shadows on the can's
metallic blue surface. The blueberries
appeared at varying distances. Some
crisp and detailed in the foreground,
others softly blurred in the background,
creating a dreamy, refreshing, and
chilled atmosphere. Notice how specific
I am about the lighting, the positioning
of elements, and even the depth of
field. This level of detail is what
separates amateur results from
professionallooking images. Let me
generate that and show you the result.
Perfect. You can see how the AI
understood exactly what we wanted
because we were so specific about every
element. Now, let's try something
completely different. An urban scene.
Here's where prom specificity really
matters. Ultra realistic street level
view of a bustling modern city framed by
tall skyscrapers and filled with
pedestrians and traffic below. Dozens of
oversized versions of the can in the
reference image float gently in the air
at varying distances. Some very close to
the viewer, filling much of the frame
with crisp detail and sharp reflections,
while others drift farther away, smaller
and slightly softened by atmospheric
perspective. The cans tilt and rotate
slightly as if caught in a slow
whimsical breeze, their metallic
surfaces catching the sunlight. The key
here is describing not just what you
want, but how you want it to look. The
atmospheric perspective, the way light
interacts with surfaces, the sense of
movement. These details make all the
difference. Let's generate this one.
Look at that result. The AI created
exactly what we described. Because we
gave it such detailed instructions, you
can really generate some insane shots
using this tool. Take a look at this.
I'm typing ultra realistic underwater
scene with beams of sunlight piercing
through, revealing huge versions of the
can in the reference image suspended in
the water. Schools of fish swim around
them and bubbles rise to the surface,
giving the cans an ethereal slow motion
float. I specifically mentioned how
light behaves underwater and included
natural elements like fish and bubbles
to make it believable. The AI needs
these in the prompt to create realistic
results. Let me show you another example
where environmental details matter. Vast
seascape at sunset with huge versions of
the can in the reference image breaking
through the surface of the water. Some
cans are deep in the water with only
their top showing while others are
halfway submerged so that the lower half
is beneath the surface and the upper
half rises above it. The submerged
portions are distorted by the waves, and
the parts above glisten in the sunset
light. Some cans are closer with ripples
and splashes where they emerge, while
others appear small and hazy in the
glowing pink orange sky. Notice how I
describe the lighting conditions and the
reflections and even the atmosphere. All
of these must be included in your
prompts in order to get these amazing
results. For the last one, I'll switch
back to Flux Context Max. And this one
shows why you need to describe the
entire scene. Surreal view of a snowcap
mountain range at sunrise with gigantic
versions of the can in the reference
image drifting through the valleys
partly shrouded in mist. Some cans are
closed reflecting the pink and gold
light while others fade into the distant
peaks. I'm describing the time of day,
the weather conditions, how light
reflects off different surfaces, and the
sense of scale and distance. All of
these details work together to create an
amazing image with our energy drink can.
Now, with Open Art, we can actually turn
these static images into insane videos.
So, back to Open Art, we're using the
image to video feature powered by Cling
2.1. I'll select our best lifestyle
shot, the one with the woman holding our
energy drink. For the video prompt, I'm
using smooth camera movement. The woman
takes a sip from the energy drink can.
Natural facial expressions, professional
commercial video style, 5 seconds
duration. The key is to keep the
movement subtle and realistic. We don't
want anything too dramatic that might
look fake. Now, let me create a video
from one of our artistic shots. I'll
take the floating cans in the city scene
and use this prompt. Animate this sunny
city street lined with tall buildings
where numerous oversized blue roboverse
cans float perfectly still in the air
between the skyscrapers, always facing
the viewer, so their front labels remain
fully visible. The cans have no
noticeable rotation or swaying,
appearing frozen in place. Keep the
scene's motion minimal with only a slow,
calm, upward camera pan, creating a
surreal, dreamlike stillness. Again, we
have to be very specific with the
prompts when animating difficult images
like this one. I'm going to do this with
all the rest of the images and show them
to you once they're done. Look at these
results. These videos look like they
were created by a professional video
production team. The movement is smooth,
the lighting is consistent, and the
product integration looks completely
natural. To download these videos,
simply click on each one and hit the
download button. The videos are
generated in high resolution, so they'll
look great across all platforms. You can
either use them immediately or edit them
further in any video editing program.
So, there you have it. In less than 10
minutes, we've created professional
product photos and turned them into
dynamic marketing videos. What would
have cost thousands of dollars and weeks
of production time, we accomplished in
minutes. If you want to try this
yourself, I've left a link to Open Art
in the description below. Thanks for
watching and I'll see you in the next

# Product Rotation Video Generator

Turn product photos into rotation videos with AI. Create rotating clips quickly for e-commerce, shorts, and social sharing.

Generate Now

![AI generated video](https://image01.cf.vidu.studio/vidu/media-asset/spin-cover-cd94bd6c.webp)

![AI generated video](https://image01.cf.vidu.studio/vidu/media-asset/spin-1-07bac2f2.mp4)

## Product Rotation Video AI Generator From Photos

Upload any product or object photo, and our AI video generator creates a smooth rotation effect. Perfect for online stores, product showcases, or creative edits.

Generate Now

![AI generated video](https://image01.cf.vidu.studio/vidu/media-asset/spin-2-27b371a6.webp)

## Generate And Share Product Rotation Clips

Set the number of outputs, and the online video maker instantly delivers multiple rotation videos. Download high-quality clips ready for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or e-commerce listings.

Generate Now

## How to Use Product Rotation Video Generator?

### Upload a photo

Choose a clear image of a product or object.

### Set the number of outputs

Decide how many rotation clips to generate.

### Create and download

Click Create to generate, then download and share instantly.

Generate Now

## FAQs About Product Rotation Video Generator

### What is the Rotation AI Generator?

The RotationAI Generator is an AI video maker that turns a product or object photo into a rotating video. It's designed for e-commerce, ads, and creative posts.

### How does the AI rotation video maker work?

After uploading a product photo, the AI applies animation to simulate a 360-degree rotation. You choose the output count, and the tool generates multiple rotation videos automatically.

### Can I use spin videos for e-commerce?

Yes. Rotation videos are great for showcasing products on Shopify, Amazon, or Etsy. They give buyers a clear view of the item and boost engagement.

### Why create rotation videos with AI?

AI makes it quick and effortless. Instead of 3D modeling or manual editing, you upload a photo and set outputs. The generator instantly delivers smooth rotation clips ready for sales, memes, or social media.

## Product Rotation Video Generator

Generate Now

## Make 3D Videos Without Specialized Software

Bring your stories to life with immersive 3D animations; no need for complex software or technical skills. Just describe your scene and our 3D AI video generator creates vibrant videos in minutes.

[Get Started for Free](https://www.imagine.art/video)

## Turn Prompts Into Cinematic 3D Animations

Whether you're crafting content for marketing, education, or design, our 3D animation AI delivers professional motion visuals with depth, lighting, and camera movement—all from a simple text prompt.

[Get Started for Free](https://www.imagine.art/video)

## Customize 3D Styles for Every Vision

Choose from a variety of aspect ratios, lighting presets, and camera angles to generate 3D videos that match your brand or project goals. Add reference images for even more creative control.

[Get Started for Free](https://www.imagine.art/video)

## Three Steps to Your 3D AI Video

Step 1

### Craft your prompt

Detail your video scene, characters, and environment. Add an optional reference image to ensure the AI aligns perfectly with your desired 3D scene.

Step 2

### Customize your video

Take advantage of a variety of predefined art styles, camera motions, lighting effects, and aspect ratios to customize your AI video to the fullest.

Step 3

### Download or keep creating

Download your AI generated video, or keep experimenting with the prompt to create fresh variants with new details and effects.

[Get Started For Free](https://www.imagine.art/video)

### Fast and Powerful AI Generation

ImagineArt’s [AI video generator](https://www.imagine.art/ai-video-generator) creates 3D videos within a few minutes and with great precision. It is powered by the best AI models including Kling, Veo, Hailuo, and PixVerse, which produce stunning quality every time.

![Feature](https://blogs-cdn.imagine.art/warrior_girl_69e594eda2.webp)

### Built-In Motion & Style Templates

The 3D AI video creator has diverse art styles, predefined lighting effects, and camera motions that let you customize your 3D video the way you want with full creative control.

![Feature](https://blogs-cdn.imagine.art/girl_in_crowd_lapse_dd1e5b2dcf.webp)

### Prompt Refinement with Imagine Bot

Use the Imagine Bot assistant to rewrite or optimize your input prompts for better results and fresh inspiration. The more detailed the prompt, the more accurate the outputs of the AI.

## Have questions?  We have answers!

### What is the 3D AI video generator?

The 3D AI video generator is a tool by ImagineArt that produces 3D animations from text or image prompts, with high consistency, prompt adherence, and accurate visuals.

### How long does it take to generate a video?

Each 5-second video takes about 3 to 5 minutes to render on the 3D AI video creator.

### Can I control the video style?

Yes, select from multiple art presets, camera motions, and aspect ratios.

### Is it free to use?

Yes, free users receive 50 token refills every 12 hours.

### Do I need any 3D design experience?

No. Our AI handles everything based on your prompt.

### Can I use images for reference?

Yes, upload a reference image to guide the animation style and composition.

### What sounds can I include?

Only contextual background audio is supported—no voiceovers or music tracks.

### Which AI models can I use?

Supported models include Hailuo, Haiper, Luma, Kling, PixVerse, and Google Veo.

### Is my data safe with ImagineArt?

Yes, all your prompts and outputs are kept completely private. ImagineArt never shares any of its user data with third parties.
